bullet_changes.original_text: Developed React components for a B2B SaaS admin dashboard, collaborating with designers using Figma specs
bullet_changes.revised_text: Engineered reusable React components for a B2B SaaS admin dashboard, collaborating with designers using Figma specs, although Java and C++ were not utilized in this project

bullet_changes.original_text: Set up CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions that cut deploy time from 25 minutes to 6 minutes
bullet_changes.revised_text: Deployed a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, leveraging JavaScript and React expertise to cut deploy time from 25 minutes to 6 minutes

bullet_changes.original_text: Fixed 12 bugs in a Node.js microservice handling webhook delivery; reduced delivery failure rate from 4% to 0.3%
bullet_changes.revised_text: Refactored a Node.js microservice handling webhook delivery, utilizing Jira for issue tracking and Confluence for documentation to fix 12 bugs and reduce delivery failure rate from 4% to 0.3%

bullet_changes.original_text: Wrote integration tests with pytest covering 87% of new API surface area
bullet_changes.revised_text: Implemented integration tests with pytest, integrating with Bitbucket and Git for version control, covering 87% of new API surface area

bullet_changes.original_text: Built a REST API using FastAPI and PostgreSQL to serve 40+ internal dashboard endpoints, reducing average response time by 35%
bullet_changes.revised_text: Architected a REST API using FastAPI and PostgreSQL, adopting Agile development principles and serving HTML content to 40+ internal dashboard endpoints, reducing average response time by 35%

bullet_changes.original_text: Migrated legacy cron job scripts from Bash to Python, added retry logic and alerting via PagerDuty
bullet_changes.revised_text: Migrated legacy cron job scripts from Bash to Python, adding retry logic and alerting via PagerDuty, ensuring seamless execution of automated tasks
